requirement_topic.en: O'zstandart Mandatory Conformity Certification for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: O'zstandart光伏逆变器强制符合性认证
requirement_topic.zht: O'zstandart光伏逆變器強制符合性認證

summary.en: Uzbekistan's Agency for Technical Regulation (O'zstandart) operates mandatory conformity certification for regulated electrical products placed on the Uzbekistan market. Solar PV inverters in the regulated product scope require an O'zstandart certificate of conformity before import or sale. The applicant (local importer, representative, or authorized manufacturer) must engage an accredited Uzbekistan conformity body, provide technical documentation and test reports based on O'z DSt or GOST standards (often IEC-aligned), and mark the product accordingly. O'zstandart publishes the list of products subject to mandatory certification.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦技术法规局（O'zstandart）对投放乌兹别克斯坦市场的受监管电气产品实施强制符合性认证。属于受监管产品范围的太阳能光伏逆变器在进口或销售前需取得O'zstandart符合性证书。申请人（当地进口商、代表机构或授权制造商）须委托经认可的乌兹别克斯坦符合性机构，提供基于O'z DSt或GOST标准（通常与IEC对齐）的技术文件和测试报告，并对产品进行相应标识。O'zstandart公布需强制认证的产品清单。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦技術法規局（O'zstandart）對投放烏茲別克斯坦市場的受監管電氣產品實施強制符合性認證。屬於受監管產品範圍的太陽能光伏逆變器在進口或銷售前需取得O'zstandart符合性證書。申請人（當地進口商、代表機構或授權製造商）須委託經認可的烏茲別克斯坦符合性機構，提供基於O'z DSt或GOST標準（通常與IEC對齊）的技術文件和測試報告，並對產品進行相應標識。O'zstandart公布需強制認證的產品清單。

standards_or_laws: O'z DSt national standards for PV inverters and electrical safety
GOST / IEC-aligned standards adopted by O'zstandart
O'zstandart mandatory product certification list and procedures
Uzbekistan technical regulation on product conformity assessment

summary.en: China-side PV inverter conformity commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, manufacturer safety testing, and IEC 62109 CB scheme reports for export. These are useful due-diligence inputs for building an O'zstandart technical file but do not substitute for the mandatory Uzbekistan conformity certificate, accredited-body testing, or O'zstandart marking obligations.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器符合性通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、制造商安全测试以及出口用IEC 62109 CB认证报告。这些可作为建立O'zstandart技术文件的有效尽调输入，但不能替代乌兹别克斯坦强制符合性证书、认可机构测试或O'zstandart标识义务。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器符合性通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、製造商安全測試以及出口用IEC 62109 CB認證報告。這些可作為建立O'zstandart技術文件的有效盡調輸入，但不能替代烏茲別克斯坦強制符合性證書、認可機構測試或O'zstandart標識義務。

standards_or_laws: IECEE CB Scheme reports where available

gap.en: A Chinese GB/T or IEC safety report does not by itself authorize import or sale in Uzbekistan. The gap is O'zstandart procedure, accredited-body engagement, certificate of conformity, Uzbek/Russian-language technical documentation, and product marking. Exporters should verify whether the inverter model is in the current mandatory certification scope and identify a local applicant or authorized representative.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T或IEC安全报告本身并不授权在乌兹别克斯坦进口或销售。差距在于O'zstandart程序、认可机构委托、符合性证书、乌兹别克语/俄语技术文件和产品标识。出口商应确认逆变器型号是否在现行强制认证范围内，并确定当地申请人或授权代表。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T或IEC安全報告本身並不授權在烏茲別克斯坦進口或銷售。差距在於O'zstandart程序、認可機構委託、符合性證書、烏茲別克語/俄語技術文件和產品標識。出口商應確認逆變器型號是否在現行強制認證範圍內，並確定當地申請人或授權代表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter is within O'zstandart mandatory certification scope for regulated electrical products
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-specific for GB/T 37408-2021; IEC 62109 is typically used for international certification export evidence

source.publisher: Agency for Technical Regulation (O'zstandart), Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat O'zstandart mandatory conformity certification as the primary Uzbekistan market-access gate; GB/T 37408 or IEC 62109 reports support the technical file but do not replace the certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将O'zstandart强制符合性认证视为乌兹别克斯坦市场准入的主要门槛；GB/T 37408或IEC 62109报告支持技术文件，但不能替代证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將O'zstandart強制符合性認證視為烏茲別克斯坦市場准入的主要門檻；GB/T 37408或IEC 62109報告支持技術文件，但不能替代證書。
